channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumping their rubbish next to my house, 23rd July
item.description:
They clean their car and dump rubbish in my car park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roman Square, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking footpath, 23rd July
item.description:
The leaves have been overhanging for the last three weeks. I am unable to take the pram through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Only two feet of footpath left due to overgrown bush., 23rd July
item.description:
Bushes planted outside B&Q have been allowed to overgrow for so long that they cover more than half the width of the footpath to the extent that it impossible for pedestrians, cyclists or 30mph electric scooters to pass each other.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crittall's Corner, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 23rd July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlton Vale, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to post office, 23rd July
item.description:
Abandoned voi bike

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gibson Road, Chadwell Heath, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish all over park, 23rd July
item.description:
Rubbish has been here for a week or so now and only getting worse

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palmers Lane, Enfield

item.title: More rubbish dumped, 23rd July
item.description:
Bag full of rotting fruit horrible smell

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palmers Lane, Enfield

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
Various items household & garden rubbish dumped by sub Station in Glendown Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matrasses and other interior material flytippinh, 23rd July
item.description:
There's flytipping on public parking spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coxmount Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped box, 23rd July
item.description:
Large cardboard box containing unknown stuff, corner of Glendown road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Worn-out markings, 23rd July
item.description:
Having paid for access protection markings to be installed at the entrance to 70/72/74 it is disappointing that poor installation has led to these markings being worn away so quickly, with poor double yellows also on the corner and increased construction traffic on Lubbock Road there is an increase in poor parking blocking the exit and vision on a regular basis I would ask that these are reinstated ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Driver moved roadworks cones out of road to drive through, 23rd July
item.description:
There are no longer cones across the road, confusing drivers, and allowing cars round the corner on to the supposedly closed road. This is also a safety issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Church Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bottles / glass hazard, 23rd July
item.description:
2 broken bottles / glass hazards (at 2 different points) along shared cycle/ pedestrian path that is parallel to Red Lodge Road. Puncture hazard for cyclists/ cut hazard for people walking in flip flops
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste fly tipping, 23rd July
item.description:
This is a repeat offender who must live close by who always dumps garden waste here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somertrees Avenue, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken street light and paving, 23rd July
item.description:
There is a broken street light outside 46/48 Balder Rise and it is very dark and unsafe. We have had break ins in the area. Also the oaving is bad up this road with lots of trip hazards. We have to walk in the road due to the bins hedges poor parking and the bad paving especially near properties numbers 2-6. Please get a team to survey this street and replace repair lighting and paving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balder Rise, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
